Come Play (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,475,990Details
International Box Office $2,148,184
Worldwide Box Office $12,624,174
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $490,779
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $270,989
Total $761,768
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Oliver is a lonely young boy who feels different from everyone else. Desperate for a friend, he seeks solace and refuge in his ever-present cell phone and tablet. When a mysterious creature uses Oliver’s devices against him to break into our world, Oliver’s parents must fight to save their son from the monster beyond the screen.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,119,875 (29.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.36 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:83.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$9,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,183 opening theaters/2,213 max. theaters, 5.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $13,525,385

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 30th, 2020 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: October 29th, 2020 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
October 30th, 2020 (Wide), released as A Maldição de Larry (Portugal)
October 30th, 2020 (Wide), released as Ateik pažaisti (Lithuania)
October 30th, 2020 (Wide) (Poland)
November 27th, 2020 (Wide) (India)
Video Release: November 15th, 2020 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for terror, frightening images and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2621 (Cert #52648), 3/18/2020)
Running Time: 96 minutes
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Short Film
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Amblin Partners, Reliance Entertainment, The Picture Company
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Oliver is a lonely young boy who feels different from everyone else. Desperate for a friend, he seeks solace and refuge in his ever-present cell phone and tablet. When a mysterious creature uses Oliver’s devices against him to break into our world, Oliver’s parents must fight to save their son from the monster beyond the screen.
